query:
SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.email, u.name, u.is_super_admin, u.workspace_role,
       u.workspace_id, u.license_number, u.license_verified_at, u.created_at,
       w.id AS ws_id, w.name AS ws_name, w.plan, w.subscription_status,
       w.tax_id, w.contact_phone, w.created_at AS ws_created_at, w.subscription_ends_at
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = u.workspace_id
WHERE u.email = 'anathemell@gmail.com';

       w.id AS ws_id, w.name AS ws_name, w.plan, w.subscription_status,
       w.tax_id, w.contact_phone, w.created_at AS ws_created_at, w.subscription_ends_at
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN workspaces w ON w.id = u.workspace_id
WHERE u.email = 'anathemell@gmail.com';
